title: It'sFaster!
description:
It's just your casual minecraft, but faster! no datapacks or texture packs! just boot it up, and play!

Version: 1.21.1

Mod Loader: Fabric
body: well, there's not much! just another faster modpack that has vanilla gameplay but faster stuff! you can see your fps manually too! but there isn't a whole lot! i reccomend adding more mods to your liking, or mabye even make a new version!
